parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claims to have been a werewolf at the start of the game, stating, 'I'm going to go out on a leg and I'm going to say that I was a werewolf when we started.' While Caitlynn also briefly claimed to be the werewolf, she later became silent and 'pleaded the fifth,' and Justin attempted to frame her as the Tanner to divert suspicion. Mitchell and Mike both express their intention or inclination to vote for Justin, making him the most likely target for Team Village to eliminate a Werewolf.
